goal: 搭建可运行的Store Sales比赛工程基线
changed_items: 初始化项目结构; 实现数据读取/校验; 增加日历/滞后/滚动/油价/节假日/门店/地震/发薪日特征; 实现递归预测与submission导出
preprocessing: sales做log1p变换; oil按日频插值+bfill/ffill; holidays按National/Regional/Local拆分; transactions仅使用历史窗口聚合; 类别特征做序数编码
validation_scheme: 时间切分 + 递归回测; synthetic smoke test
conclusion: 工程链路已经跑通并能生成validation与submission文件，但结果仅来自合成数据，尚未形成真实比赛基线
next_action: 下载真实Kaggle原始CSV并记录首个离线RMSLE与首个提交分数

goal: 在真实Kaggle数据上跑通首个正式baseline
changed_items: 使用data/raw中的真实train/test/stores/oil/holidays_events/transactions数据运行完整pipeline; 产出validation_predictions/validation_metrics/submission
preprocessing: sales做log1p变换; oil按日频插值+bfill/ffill; holidays按National/Regional/Local拆分; transactions仅使用历史窗口聚合; 类别特征做序数编码
validation_scheme: 时间切分 + 递归回测
conclusion: 首个真实baseline已成功跑通并提交; 离线RMSLE=0.423002但Kaggle公开榜=0.58410，说明当前单窗口离线验证偏乐观，后续需要用多窗口验证校准方向
next_action: 增加多窗口验证; 优先尝试更稳的季节性/分组特征和LightGBM

goal: run Store Sales pipeline and record validation/submission outputs
changed_items: ran validation pipeline; generated validation metrics, fold summary, and validation predictions
preprocessing: sales log1p target; oil daily interpolation; holiday locale aggregation; historical transaction aggregation; ordinal categorical encoding
validation_scheme: time split + recursive forecast; windows=3; horizon=16; step_days=16
conclusion: 不保留：mean RMSLE 0.403019 高于 baseline 0.401601；fold 3 从 0.423002 恶化到 0.426889；SCHOOL AND OFFICE SUPPLIES 从 0.671040 恶化到 0.712021
next_action: 下一步先做 fold 3 交叉误差分析或单独分析 SCHOOL AND OFFICE SUPPLIES，不继续盲目增强 broad low-demand 特征

goal: 验证 SCHOOL AND OFFICE SUPPLIES 的 8月/promotion/store targeted features 是否改善 fold 3 underprediction
changed_items: ran validation pipeline; generated validation metrics, fold summary, validation predictions, and Kaggle submission
preprocessing: sales log1p target; oil daily interpolation; holiday locale aggregation; historical transaction aggregation; ordinal categorical encoding
validation_scheme: time split + recursive forecast; windows=3; horizon=16; step_days=16
conclusion: 不保留为默认方案：mean RMSLE 0.398186 优于 baseline 0.401601，但 Kaggle public score 0.59096 差于 baseline 0.58410；说明该 targeted feature 更像贴合本地 fold 3，存在 validation selection bias
next_action: 回到 baseline 作为当前最佳提交；下一步优先改进验证方式或尝试更稳健模型/全局特征，不继续沿 school_supplies_aug_promo 加强

goal: 建立 August / pre-test historical validation 检查 public mismatch
changed_items: ran validation-only comparison for baseline and school_supplies_aug_promo on explicit August/pre-test windows
preprocessing: sales log1p target; oil daily interpolation; holiday locale aggregation; historical transaction aggregation; ordinal categorical encoding
validation_scheme: explicit time windows + recursive forecast; train_start_date=2013-01-01
conclusion: August windows 仍然认为 school_supplies_aug_promo 优于 baseline：0.486425 vs 0.490514；但 Kaggle public score 已显示其更差，说明历史 8 月窗口仍不足以筛掉该失败实验
next_action: 下一步增加 public-like 稳定性检查：非目标 family 副作用、promotion bin 切片、store/family drift；再进入全局特征或模型对比

goal: 解释 school_supplies_aug_promo 本地改善但 public 变差的切片原因
preprocessing: sales log1p target; validation/test distribution drift uses known fields only
conclusion: 不保留 school_supplies_aug_promo：target family 改善明显，但 16 个非目标 family 变差；PERSONAL CARE + 11-50、DAIRY + 11-50、BREAD/BAKERY + 11-50 等 test-overweighted family-promotion slices 同时存在本地回退
next_action: 下一步实验保留标准加入 non-target regression count、promotion bin regression、test-overweighted regression slices；之后再尝试全局特征或模型对比
